title_en: The Window That Didn't Open — van Rossem Stays Unforked Past 6/23, ADA Hits a 5-Year Low, and the Leios Testnet Launches
title_ja: 越えなかった窓 — van Rossem は 6/23 を過ぎても未 fork、ADA は5年来安値、Leios テストネット始動
executive_summary_en:
W25 ended with a prediction: the van Rossem mainnet hard-fork governance action had been submitted (6/17), the enactment window opened ~6/23, and "next issue should record it as done." **W26's most important honest update is that it isn't.** As of writing, Koios measures mainnet `protocol_major` at **10** at epoch 639 — the chain has **not** forked to Protocol Version 11. The governance action remains in its voting/ratification path (submission ≠ ratification ≠ enactment, the framing this brief has held since W22), and the ~6/23 window passed without a clean mainnet fork. The build is real, but this week it slipped its clock.

**The macro regime, meanwhile, hardened from W25's "hawkish but orderly" into a broader, AI/tech-led risk-off.** US equities rolled over — the **Nasdaq fell ~-4.6% W-o-W into a multi-session losing streak**, the S&P -2.0%, while the Dow held (+0.6%). The W25 weak-yen Nikkei melt-up **reversed (-3.1%)**, the **VIX climbed back to ~18.4 (+12.3%)**, gold gave back -2.9%, and oil slid further (WTI -7.1%, Brent -7.3%) as Strait-of-Hormuz transit reportedly normalized. The dollar stayed firm (DXY +0.5%, USDJPY ~161.7). The liquidity squeeze implied by Warsh's 6/17 hawkish pivot played through risk assets — and this time it reached crypto.

**Crypto fell with the tape.** ADA dropped **-8.1% W-o-W to ~$0.148**, having printed a roughly **5-year low near $0.16 on 6/22** (a sharp +6.25% 24h bounce was underway at the W26 reference capture). BTC -5.0%, ETH -7.6%, and the long tail was worse (DOT -10.9%, ATOM -11.6%, ALGO -9.0%, FET -6.1%). The clear exception was **SOL (+3.6%)**, tied to a 100B-transaction network milestone. ADA's market cap fell to ~$5.5B and its rank slipped (≈#18 → ≈#21) — the weakest major in a broadly red week.

**NIGHT re-diverged — modestly.** After W25 recorded the three-week decoupling "faded" (NIGHT had moved in line with ADA), W26 shows a partial re-separation: **NIGHT was roughly flat (-0.9% CoinGecko / -1.7% SDE) against ADA's -8.1%.** We treat this exactly as before — an attention-based, not usage-based, signal. Cross-venue dispersion persists and no City V2 usage data has been published, so this stays a **watch item, not a thesis.** The honest pattern across W21→W26 is a decoupling that appears, fades, and reappears with attention flows — durable proof still requires published usage.

**Beneath the missed fork window, the build did advance.** The public testnet for **Ouroboros Leios — "Musashi Dojo" — launched 6/23**, Cardano's next-generation high-throughput consensus (targeting a large multiple of current throughput). The **2026 budget moved on-chain**: of 69 proposals requesting ~331.6M ADA (NCL 350M), **11 cleared the Hydra-voting stage and entered on-chain treasury-withdrawal voting (largest: Intersect Governance 25.4M ADA; deadline ~7/23).** The **Constitutional Committee 2026 election** is in its voting window (10 candidates for 4 seats, closing 7/23). And Midnight's mainnet (Kūkolu) with live DUST continues. The cadence held — only the single most-anticipated item, the mainnet fork, did not land on its window.

**The core of reading W26 is a price-and-build divergence sharpened by timing: a macro-led risk-off pulled crypto to multi-year lows while the build advanced on every front except the one it was supposed to finish.** The posture is two-stage: **short-term (1–4 weeks), watch the actual van Rossem mainnet enactment (now overdue against its own window), whether the AI/tech-led risk-off and the ADA ~5-year-low zone stabilize, and the SPO/tooling readiness that gates the fork; medium-term (2026 H2), watch whether Leios, Pyth (live since W25), and the post-fork toolchain convert into measurable DeFi/RWA usage — the same "does build become usage?" test that NIGHT's on-again-off-again decoupling keeps underscoring.**
executive_summary_ja:
W25 は一つの予告で終わった — van Rossem mainnet hard fork のガバナンスアクションは提出済み（6/17）、発効ウィンドウは約 6/23 に開き、「次号は *done* として記録できるべきだ」と。**W26 の最も重要な honest な更新は、そうならなかったことだ。** 執筆時点で Koios はエポック 639 の mainnet `protocol_major` を **10** と計測している — チェーンは Protocol Version 11 へ **fork していない**。ガバナンスアクションは投票・批准の経路に残り（提出 ≠ 批准 ≠ 発効、本ブリーフが W22 から保ってきた framing）、約 6/23 のウィンドウはクリーンな mainnet fork なしに過ぎた。ビルドは実体だが、今週は時計を外した。

**一方マクロは、W25 の「hawkish だが秩序立った」から、より広い AI/tech 主導の risk-off へ硬化した。** 米株は崩れ — **Nasdaq は前週比 約 -4.6% で連続安**、S&P -2.0%、一方で Dow は底堅い（+0.6%）。W25 の円安 Nikkei melt-up は **反転（-3.1%）**、**VIX は約 18.4 へ上昇（+12.3%）**、金は -2.9% 戻し、原油はさらに下落（WTI -7.1%・Brent -7.3%）— ホルムズ海峡の通航が正常化したと報じられた。ドルは堅調を維持（DXY +0.5%・USDJPY 約 161.7）。Warsh の 6/17 hawkish 転換が含意した流動性の圧迫がリスク資産に波及し、今回は暗号資産にも届いた。

**暗号資産は相場に連れ安した。** ADA は **前週比 -8.1% で約 $0.148**、6/22 には約 **5年来安値〜$0.16** を付けた（W26 基準キャプチャ時点では +6.25% の急反発が進行中）。BTC -5.0%、ETH -7.6%、長い尾はさらに弱い（DOT -10.9%・ATOM -11.6%・ALGO -9.0%・FET -6.1%）。明確な例外は **SOL（+3.6%）** — 1000 億トランザクションのネットワーク節目に紐づく。ADA の時価総額は約 $5.5B へ低下し、順位は後退（約 #18 → 約 #21）— 全面安の週で最も弱い主要資産だった。

**NIGHT は再び乖離した — ただし小幅に。** W25 が 3 週間の decoupling の「フェード」（NIGHT が ADA と同調）を記録したのに対し、W26 は部分的な再分離を示す — **NIGHT はほぼ横ばい（-0.9% CoinGecko / -1.7% SDE）、ADA の -8.1% に対して**。扱いは従来通り — 利用ではなく注目に基づくシグナルだ。取引所間の価格分散は続き、City V2 の利用データも未公表ゆえ、これは **thesis ではなく watch item** に留まる。W21→W26 を通じた honest なパターンは、注目フローとともに現れ・褪せ・再来する decoupling であり、持続的な証明にはなお公表される利用データが要る。

**逃した fork ウィンドウの裏で、ビルドは前進した。** 次世代の高スループット・コンセンサス **Ouroboros Leios の公開テストネット「Musashi Dojo」が 6/23 に始動**（現行の数倍のスループットを標榜）。**2026 予算はオンチェーンへ進んだ** — 約 331.6M ADA を要求する 69 提案（NCL 350M）のうち、**11 件が Hydra 投票段階をクリアしてオンチェーンの treasury withdrawal 投票へ（最大は Intersect Governance 25.4M ADA・期限 約 7/23）**。**憲法委員会 2026 選挙**は投票窓内（10 候補・4 議席・7/23 締切）。Midnight の mainnet（Kūkolu）と稼働中の DUST も継続する。歩調は保たれた — ただ一つ、最も期待されていた mainnet fork だけが、その窓に着地しなかった。

**W26 を読み解く核は、タイミングによって鋭くなった『価格と構築の乖離』だ — マクロ主導の risk-off が暗号資産を数年来の安値へ引き、その間ビルドは、完了するはずだった一点を除くすべての面で前進した。** 姿勢は二段構え — **短期（1-4 週）は van Rossem mainnet の実発効（自らの窓に対して既に遅延）、AI/tech 主導 risk-off と ADA 5年来安値ゾーンが安定するか、fork を律する SPO/ツール readiness を監視。中期（2026 下期）は Leios・Pyth（W25 から稼働）・fork 後ツールチェーンが測定可能な DeFi/RWA 利用へ転換するかを監視する — NIGHT の現れては消える decoupling が繰り返し浮き彫りにする『実装は利用になるか』の同じテストだ。**

ticker_extras.night_note: CoinGecko spot ($0.0307); SDE night tracking shows -1.7% to ~$0.0305 — both leave NIGHT roughly flat vs ADA's -8.1%, a modest re-divergence after W25's faded decoupling; cross-venue dispersion persists; still no published usage data; carried as a watch item
ticker_extras.sol_note: the week's clear outlier; tied to a 100B-transaction network milestone
ticker_extras.us10y_note: TNX missing from the 6/27 SDE auto-capture; 4.37% sourced from manual cross-check (TradingEconomics + Yahoo), per SDE weekend note
ticker_extras.usdjpy_note: still in the intervention-watch zone (~161-162); no confirmed BOJ/MOF action this week
ticker_extras.ada_5y_low: ~$0.16 printed 2026-06-22 (roughly a 5-year low); +6.25% 24h bounce underway at the W26 reference capture
ticker_extras.macro_regime_context: W25's 'hawkish but orderly' regime hardened into a broader AI/tech-led equity risk-off; Nasdaq -4.6% W-o-W losing streak, Nikkei melt-up reversed -3.1%, VIX +12.3% to 18.4, oil -7% on reported Hormuz transit normalization; dollar firm (DXY +0.5%, USDJPY ~161.7)

van_rossem_hf.predicted_in_w25: enactment window ~2026-06-23; 'next issue should record it as done'
van_rossem_hf.actual_w26: NOT enacted — Koios cli_protocol_params measures mainnet protocol_major=10 at epoch 639 (PV10); the ~6/23 window passed without a clean mainnet fork
van_rossem_hf.status: mainnet hard-fork-initiation governance action remains in voting/ratification; submission != ratification != enactment; SPO/tooling (node v11.0.x, DB-Sync, Ogmios, Kupo) readiness gates enactment
van_rossem_hf.source: Koios cli_protocol_params (live, 2026-06-27) + Intersect MBO / gov.tools governance action

leios_testnet.name: Ouroboros Leios public testnet 'Musashi Dojo'
leios_testnet.what: next-generation high-throughput consensus public testnet; staged stress test
leios_testnet.throughput_target: a large multiple of current throughput (commonly cited ~10-65x; treat magnitude as a target, not a guarantee)
leios_testnet.source: Intersect MBO / Hoskinson announcement + secondary reporting (marked 'reported' in-text)

cardano_2026_budget.process: 69 proposals requesting ~331,569,537 ADA total; NCL 350M ADA (Epoch 613 -> end of Epoch 713)
cardano_2026_budget.on_chain: 11 proposals cleared Hydra Voting (67%) and moved to on-chain treasury-withdrawal voting (~2026-06-23)
cardano_2026_budget.other_items: Wirex ~3.96M / Mithril ~3.81M / TxPipe tooling (Tx3, Dolos, Oura, Pallas, UTxO RPC) / hardware-wallet maintenance / MLabs / TSC support
cardano_2026_budget.cf_endorsement: Cardano Foundation voted YES on proposals totaling ~115.4M ADA

cc_election.voting_window: late June -> 2026-07-23 (W25 cited 6/23 open; some sources cite 6/28 open) - treat the exact open day cautiously
cc_election.status: voting underway / opening; results after the window closes 7/23

governance_summit.summit_2026: rejected by governance vote (reported ~65.2% vs the 66.7% threshold; ~late May 2026) — a live demonstration of Voltaire veto power

midnight.mainnet_phase: Kūkolu (federated mainnet live since 2026-03-31); DUST in production; NIGHT tradable
midnight.night_thaw: 90-day redemption thaw cycles ongoing through ~Dec 2026 (structural sell-pressure)
midnight.roadmap: Kūkolu (live) -> Mōhalu (Q2-Q3, incentivized testnet, SPO onboarding, DUST Capacity Exchange) -> Hua (late 2026, full decentralization, bidirectional bridge + LayerZero) — timelines are targets, not commitments
midnight.monument_bank: deposit-tokenization PoC (announced 2026-03-25; up-to-£250M is a planned figure, not confirmed TVL)

regulatory.clarity_act: passed Senate Banking (15-9, 5/14); on Senate calendar (6/1); ethics talks collapsed (6/9); Lummis set end-July floor deadline; needs ~7 Democratic votes; prospects uncertain (reported)
regulatory.japan_fiea: FIEA amendment (crypto reclassified as financial instruments) passed the Lower House 6/11; awaits Upper House (effective ~FY2027); flat 20% separate-taxation a separate track slated for 2028-01-01
regulatory.source: committee records + press (marked 'reported' in-text); FSA Japan official

fed_context.warsh_first_fomc: 2026-06-16/17 held 3.50-3.75%; hawkish-leaning dot plot (some members pencil hikes); communication reset toward data-dependence
fed_context.w26_followthrough: the implied liquidity squeeze played through risk assets in W26, reaching crypto; AI/tech equity selloff led the tape

sipo.drep_card_current: drep_card.json currently shows rank: null (delegated ~101.4M ADA, 360 delegators) — #11 carried from W25 pending live re-verification

four_panel_summary.governance: The headline is a missed window: van Rossem's mainnet hard fork did NOT enact on its ~6/23 schedule — Koios measures protocol_major=10 (PV10) at epoch 639, and the governance action remains in voting. The 2026 budget moved on-chain (11 of 69 proposals, ~331.6M ADA requested / NCL 350M, cleared Hydra Voting; Intersect Governance 25.4M ADA largest; deadline ~7/23), and the Constitutional Committee 2026 election (10 candidates / 4 seats) is in its voting window to 7/23. On macro policy, the follow-through from Warsh's 6/17 hawkish pivot — a liquidity squeeze — drove the week's risk-off. SIPO carries DRep #11 (live rank re-verification pending).
four_panel_summary.governance_ja: 見出しは『逃した窓』だ — van Rossem mainnet hard fork は約 6/23 の予定で発効せず、Koios はエポック 639 で protocol_major=10（PV10）を計測、ガバナンスアクションは投票中のまま。2026 予算はオンチェーンへ（69 提案中 11 件・要求 約 331.6M ADA / NCL 350M が Hydra 投票を通過、最大は Intersect Governance 25.4M ADA、期限 約 7/23）、憲法委員会 2026 選挙（10 候補 / 4 議席）は 7/23 までの投票窓内。マクロ政策では Warsh 6/17 hawkish 転換の波及（流動性圧迫）が週の risk-off を主導。SIPO は DRep #11 を継承（ライブ順位の再検証は保留）。
four_panel_summary.defi: DeFi treaded water in a red tape. Cardano TVL eased to ~$84M (DefiLlama), down from ~$91M a week earlier with ADA -8.1%. Top protocols by TVL: Minswap ~$22.6M, Liqwid ~$13.9M, Dano ~$13.2M, SundaeSwap ~$6.0M, Djed ~$4.7M. The build-side catalyst was infrastructure, not price: the Ouroboros Leios public testnet 'Musashi Dojo' launched 6/23, extending the Pyth-oracle (live W25) thread toward a higher-throughput, better-tooled DeFi/RWA base. Sector mix stays DEX-heavy (~58%) with lending ~24%.
four_panel_summary.defi_ja: DeFi は全面安の中で足踏み。Cardano TVL は約 $84M（DefiLlama）へ、一週前の約 $91M から ADA -8.1% に伴い軟化。TVL 上位は Minswap 約 $22.6M、Liqwid 約 $13.9M、Dano 約 $13.2M、SundaeSwap 約 $6.0M、Djed 約 $4.7M。ビルド側の触媒は価格ではなくインフラ — Ouroboros Leios の公開テストネット『Musashi Dojo』が 6/23 始動し、Pyth オラクル（W25 稼働）の流れを、より高スループットでツールの厚い DeFi/RWA 基盤へ延伸。セクター構成は DEX 中心（約 58%）+ レンディング 約 24%。
four_panel_summary.midnight: NIGHT re-diverged — modestly. After W25 recorded the decoupling 'faded,' W26 shows NIGHT roughly flat (-0.9% CoinGecko / -1.7% SDE) against ADA's -8.1% — a partial re-separation, not a confirmed inversion. We keep it a watch item, not a thesis: cross-venue dispersion persists and no City V2 usage data is published. On the build side, the Kūkolu mainnet and live DUST continue; the roadmap (Mōhalu SPO onboarding, then Hua decentralization + bridge) advances on its own clock, and NIGHT carries structural thaw-unlock sell-pressure through ~Dec 2026.
four_panel_summary.midnight_ja: NIGHT は再び乖離 — ただし小幅。W25 が decoupling の『フェード』を記録した後、W26 は NIGHT がほぼ横ばい（-0.9% CoinGecko / -1.7% SDE）で ADA の -8.1% に対し、部分的な再分離を示す — 確認された逆転ではない。扱いは thesis ではなく watch item — 取引所間分散は続き、City V2 利用データも未公表。ビルド側では Kūkolu mainnet と稼働中 DUST が継続、ロードマップ（Mōhalu の SPO オンボーディング → Hua の分権化 + ブリッジ）は自らの時計で前進、NIGHT は ~2026/12 まで thaw 解禁の構造的売り圧力を抱える。
four_panel_summary.risk: Overall MEDIUM -> ELEVATED. Macro MEDIUM -> HIGH — the Warsh hawkish pivot's liquidity squeeze fed an AI/tech-led equity risk-off (Nasdaq -4.6% W-o-W, VIX +12.3% to 18.4, Nikkei melt-up reversed -3.1%); dollar firm, oil -7% on reported Hormuz normalization. Architecture LOW -> MEDIUM — van Rossem MISSED its ~6/23 enactment window (PV10 still live), the one negative architecture surprise, even as Leios testnet launched. Adoption LOW -> — Leios + on-chain budget, but price at multi-year lows and NIGHT's signal unresolved. Governance MEDIUM -> — 2026 budget on-chain + CC election voting. Regulatory MEDIUM -> — CLARITY stalls toward its July deadline; Japan FIEA advances.
four_panel_summary.risk_ja: 総合 MEDIUM -> ELEVATED。Macro MEDIUM -> HIGH — Warsh hawkish 転換の流動性圧迫が AI/tech 主導の株式 risk-off を誘発（Nasdaq 前週比 -4.6%、VIX +12.3% で 18.4、Nikkei melt-up 反転 -3.1%）、ドル堅調・原油はホルムズ正常化報道で -7%。Architecture LOW -> MEDIUM — van Rossem が約 6/23 の発効窓を *逃した*（PV10 が継続）— 唯一のネガティブなアーキ・サプライズ、ただし Leios テストネットは始動。Adoption LOW -> — Leios + オンチェーン予算、ただし価格は数年来安値で NIGHT のシグナルは未決。Governance MEDIUM -> — 2026 予算オンチェーン + CC 選挙投票。Regulatory MEDIUM -> — CLARITY は 7 月期限へ失速、日本 FIEA は前進。
